docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GABRIEL
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELMONICO, ERIN (NEE ALLEN) AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GABRIEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED BY COURT CALL. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-13-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-21-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE, & REQUESTING A LATER HEARING DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELMONICO, ERIN (NEE ALLEN)
EXHIBITS RECEIVED FOR TELEPHONIC HEARING ON FEB 3, 2014 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELMONICO, ERIN (NEE ALLEN)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELMONICO, ERIN (NEE ALLEN) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GABRIEL $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,130.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,000.00 HAVE BEEN ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5 IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
